name: archon-datahub
description: Archon — a self-auditing metadata-governance & lineage agent for DataHub. Connects to a DataHub instance over the DataHub MCP Server, harvests metadata (entities, aspects, lineage, governance), and runs a self-audit that detects metadata contradictions, lineage gaps, and governance violations — producing read-only, human-gated findings.
